description: This file contains styles for a sidebar component, including responsive layout adjustments, link styles, and layout behaviors using Sass syntax and mixins.
external_files: variables and mixins related to media breakpoints and CSS variables (implied by @include and var() usage)

methods.name: media-breakpoint-up
methods.description: Mixin for applying styles at viewport widths above a specified breakpoint.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-down
methods.description: Mixin for applying styles at viewport widths below a specified breakpoint.

methods.name: media-breakpoint-between
methods.description: Mixin for applying styles between two breakpoints.

methods.name: subtract
methods.description: Function to calculate height by subtracting a value from 100vh.

methods.name: if
methods.description: Sass conditional function for setting styles based on variables.
